title: profiles.js getProfile(hardware)实现验证 + cpu-only profile
description: BUG FIX REQUIRED: matcher.js does not enforce gpu type mismatch — profiles with wrong gpu type are not eliminated. Fix matcher.js to filter out profiles where hardware.gpu.type does not match profile gpu requirement. Then verify src/detector/profiles.js getProfile(hardware) works correctly and add cpu-only profile to profiles/default.json.
